children.heading: Secretary of the Treasury
children.label: a Secretary of the Treasury
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury shall prescribe such regulations as may be necessary to carry out this title and the amendments made by this title (except as provided by subsection (b)).11See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Secretary of Labor
children.label: b Secretary of Labor
children.text: The Secretary of Labor shall prescribe such regulations as may be necessary to carry out the labor value content determination under .section 4532 of this title
